problem id: 33910360
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10011101 -> 00111010
  01001011 -> 00001001
  11011010 -> 00000101
  10111011 -> 10110001
  11000001 -> 01100100
  01111110 -> 11000111
  11111001 -> 10011000
  11101011 -> 11011001
  01111001 -> 11011000
  11010011 -> 00100101

query: 10010010
predicted answer: 00000001
